latestReleaseNotes:
### Release info
Oobee is available as a desktop app for Mac and Windows. The setup files can be downloaded under `Assets` at the bottom of the page.

### Installation Guide
* Refer to the [Installation Guide](https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/blob/master/INSTALLATION.md) for Windows and Mac.

### What's New
#### New Features
* In this release, website crawler (legacy, new intelligent crawler, sitemap scans) should run up to 50% faster scans (4m55s vs previous 7m19s, 100 pages with elements screenshots captured) with the refactoring of how crawlee handles user profile and report generation.
* feat: make intelligent crawler the default scan type by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/230 and https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/commit/2133efc3876ee46fe38a276459ddd910c4c143ef
* Add Hidden Proxy Configuration Feature that can be reached using Cmd+Shift+X or Ctrl+Shift+X by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/244

#### Improvements
* fix: filter false-positive aria-hidden-focus violations from carousel timing races by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/753
* fix: use cloned browser profile and pass user-agent to crawler contexts, automated concurrency recovery by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/755
* improve: redirect entry URL handling and harden sitemap crawl resiliency by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/770
* improv: Supports Admin By Request by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/246

#### Fixes
* fix: get page title before operations that may close the page by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/746
* fix: remove duplicate/false-positive error entries caused by request retries by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/747
* fix: resolve sitemap detection and content fetch failures in headless/Docker environments by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/748
* fix: normalize www prefix in hostname comparisons and add adaptive crawl rate control by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/750
* fix: claim scan slots at success time to prevent maxPages undershoot by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/752
* fix(deps): bump lodash to 4.18.1 for security patch by @WilsonkwSheng in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/756
* Fix/sentry scan metadata by category and websiteTag custom variable by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/757
* fix: use Crawlee dataset.drop() for graceful storage cleanup by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/745
* Fix/sentry scan metadata by category and websiteTag custom variable by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/757
* fix: use Crawlee dataset.drop() for graceful storage cleanup by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/745
* chore: upgrade @sentry/node to v10 and refresh scanner fallback version by @WilsonkwSheng in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/758
* fix: issues regarding authentication-triggered CORS failures, fatal JSON parsing errors that blocked report artifact generation, and messy console logs during initial connectivity checks by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/759
* chore: bump version to v0.10.93 by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/240
* Bump form-data by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/241
* Bump @opentelemetry/core and @sentry/electron by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/242
* chore(security): patch transitive @opentelemetry/core and js-yaml via npm overrides by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/243
* Fix Jetpack/XSL sitemap handling and skip image sitemap feeds by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/763
* Restore sitemap index parsing and image sitemap skip logic by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/764
* Fix/report a11y issues by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/765
* refactor(crawler): use common preNavigationHooks for auth headers in crawlDomain and crawlSitemap by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/762
* Fix: suppress Playwright header-rewrite warning for unauthenticated scans by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/767
* fix: url guard infinite redirect and missing scan overlay on macOS/Windows by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/768
* Fix accessibility regressions and custom-flow screenshot/lightbox behavior in EJS reports by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/769

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/compare/0.10.91...0.10.94
latestPreReleaseNotes:
### Release info
Oobee is available as a desktop app for Mac and Windows. The setup files can be downloaded under `Assets` at the bottom of the page.

### Installation Guide
* Refer to the [Installation Guide](https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/blob/master/INSTALLATION.md) for Windows and Mac.

### What's New
#### Improvements
* improv: omit passed items from disk writes to reduce storage usage by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/773

#### Fixes
* fix: restore "Adhere to robots.txt" option in Advanced Scan Options by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/247
* fix: re-extract backend when engine version differs from app version by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/248
* chore(deps): bump undici from 7.24.4 to 7.28.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/771
* fix: restrict TMPDIR cleanup to Docker and isolate per scan instance by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/775

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/compare/0.10.94...0.10.95
